Google.//: Populate via dotnet user-secrets to avoid committing secrets:
Google.//SpaCallback: In dev the SPA runs on Vite (:5173) while the API runs on :5248. The Google flow MUST stay on the API origin so the correlation cookie matches the callback host; once the JWT is minted we bounce the browser back to the SPA origin so the React app can install the token.
